name: research-cards
description: Research-card automation with selectable backend (Heptabase, Obsidian vault, or both with bidirectional sync) and selectable agent (Claude Code or Codex): clip papers from digests into teaching-style cards, maintain Tasks-based comparison overviews and a knowledge graph, log and consolidate research-project cards. Configure via ~/.config/research-cards/config.json (see config.example.json).
